text: Incredibly easy to set up. Had our team onboarded within a day and the analytics dashboard is exactly what we needed.
author: Sarah M.

text: The mobile app is frustratingly slow and crashes on large exports. Desktop experience is great though.
author: James K.

text: Best project management tool we've used in 5 years. Integrations with Slack and GitHub work flawlessly.
author: Priya T.

text: Pricing jumped 40% at renewal with no notice. Features are good but the billing practices are a dealbreaker.
author: Anonymous

text: Customer support is outstanding. Every ticket resolved within hours and they actually follow up.
author: David L.

text: UI is cluttered and the learning curve is steep. Took our team 2 weeks to feel comfortable.
author: Maria C.

text: Solid core features but the reporting module is barebones compared to competitors. Needs more chart types.
author: Tom W.

text: Switched from a competitor and never looked back. The automation workflows save us 3 hours a week.
author: Lisa B.

text: Constant minor bugs after each update. Nothing show-stopping but it erodes confidence in the platform.
author: Ahmed R.

text: Perfect for small teams. We're 8 people and it handles everything we throw at it without breaking a sweat.
author: Nina S.

text: The API documentation is sparse and outdated. Spent days figuring out webhook payloads from trial and error.
author: Chris P.

text: Genuinely delightful product. The keyboard shortcuts alone make it worth switching from anything else.
author: Emma D.

text: SSO configuration was a nightmare. Took two calls with support and a custom workaround to get it working.
author: Kevin H.

text: Excellent value for the price. We compared 6 tools and this delivered the most for our budget.
author: Rachel F.

text: Offline mode is unreliable — changes don't sync properly when reconnecting. Lost data twice.
author: Ben A.
